overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city. The player crosses intersections and walks along streets lined with holographic advertisements and glass skyscrapers before entering a darker covered urban plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy neon-lit intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: begins crossing the wet intersection crosswalk
turns left at the intersection onto the main street

agents.ego_description: crosses the wet intersection and turns left onto the main street, navigating through light traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street ahead

entered.detail: red rectangular neon sign with white 'Crescent' text mounted on a pole
broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
tall buildings with holographic advertisements and colorful neon lighting
tall metal pole with pedestrian crossing signal and traffic lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rain-soaked intersection in a futuristic city at night. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk, passing a red Crescent neon sign on the left while futuristic vehicles drive through the intersection. After crossing, the camera turns left onto the main street, revealing towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with glass-fronted buildings and neon signage

events.description: enters area with prominent curved glass commercial building on the right
passes the large circular Sphere neon sign on the right building facade

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and observing the neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top walking past camera on the right
yellow futuristic taxi driving along the street

entered.detail: curved glass facade building with teal and purple neon lighting
large circular neon sign with 'SPHERE' text in white and orange
massive holographic advertisement featuring a samurai figure with purple lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial street, the camera passes by a prominent glass building with curved architecture on the right, featuring a large Sphere neon sign. The wet pavement reflects the purple and teal neon lights from the samurai hologram billboard on the left. Pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and a yellow taxi drives past on the left as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: transit corridor under elevated highway with red neon signage

events.description: enters covered area beneath the elevated overpass structure
crosses another street intersection beneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: crosses beneath the overpass and continues through the urban corridor, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass with green neon strip lighting underneath
series of red rectangular neon signs hanging from vertical poles
traffic signals and crosswalk markings at the intersection under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a covered corridor beneath a massive elevated overpass, where the lighting shifts to a mix of shadows and colored neon. Red neon banners line the left side of the street. The camera crosses another intersection under the overpass, with the concrete structure dominating the sky view, and continues into a darker urban passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with benches and digital screens

events.description: enters darker section with predominantly red neon reflections on wet ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit covered plaza approaching a group of people in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians standing and conversing near the end of the walkway

entered.detail: metal benches lined along the right side of the covered walkway
massive curved digital display wall showing abstract blue and red patterns
rectangular concrete planters with small trees and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a darker covered pedestrian plaza where red neon lights reflect off the wet concrete ground. Metal benches and concrete planters line the right side, while a massive curved digital screen dominates the left wall. The camera continues toward a group of pedestrians in the distance as the environment becomes increasingly enclosed and shadowed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked futuristic city that transitions from an open, neon-lit intersection into a dark, enclosed urban plaza. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk past a red Crescent neon sign, before turning left onto a main street where towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements loom in the distance. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes a corridor of light and reflection, passing a curved glass building with a Sphere sign and a samurai hologram that casts purple and teal glows onto the wet pavement. The scene then shifts as the camera enters a covered corridor beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the open sky is replaced by shadows and red neon banners. Finally, the movement leads into a darker pedestrian plaza characterized by wet concrete, metal benches, and a massive curved digital screen, ending as the surroundings become increasingly enclosed and shadowed.
